---
title: "Jacob Scott"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/_wurli
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jacob-scott-961a42248/ 
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/wurli
---

I am a data scientist working in the UK public sector, mainly writing R code. This is where I put stuff I think is worth writing down but doesn't fit on twitter.
